    N

    NewChild - Class in Project.Commands.Project
    Creates a new child element under a specified parent element.

    NoElement - Exception Class in Project.Exceptions
    Runtime exception indicating a requested element was not found.

    NoFile - Exception Class in Project.Exceptions
    Runtime exception indicating no file is currently open or available.
